# plan

Reads `exploration.md` and `design.md` and produces a bite-sized, ordered implementation plan in `plan.md`.

## When to use

Say "plan", "write the plan", or "plan the implementation". Also triggered automatically at the end of `explore-issue`.

## What it produces

`sessions/NNN-issue-title/plan.md` — ordered tasks, each independently testable, with dependencies noted.

## Handoff

Commits `plan.md`, then hands off to `implement`.
